active_level_requires: castable active levels must define action, mana_cost, range, and exactly one temporal mode
normalization_rules: Parent abilities may be non-castable containers that define shared rules or level progression for child abilities.
Integrated child features may inherit activation from a parent active ability instead of repeating action, mana cost, and range.
Unavailable levels are represented explicitly with available=false.

abilities.summary: Add awareness level to alertness skill.
Gain temporary inspiration each session.
Identify characters subject to CR limits.
Identify items by quality.
Automatically stand after incapacitation once per day.
Increase physical stats and later add DR.
Add CC level to Social skill.
Add Social skill level while defending against control effects.
Control or paralyze targets through contested rolls.
notes: If control fails, or ends while the target is still alive, the target knows you did something and you may become first on its aggro list.

abilities.summary: Direct elemental or necrotic magical attack.
notes: Vulnerable creatures take 1.5x damage, round up.

abilities.summary: Zero-mana elemental magical attack.
Split magical damage among multiple targets.
Heal living targets and remove bleeding.
Cure poison, disease, and curse.
Mend wounds and stop bleeding.
Create a light aura that grants hit, DR, and later soak bonuses.
Gain mana bonus and provide night vision.
While LTBL is active, reduce darkness-based resistance levels by one.
notes: This is not a separately castable action. It is an integrated level 5 feature of Let There Be Light.

abilities.summary: Restore mana to a friendly target, including self.
Parent summoning power for skeletons, skeleton kings, and zombies.
Create one skeleton with sword, shield, body armor, and helmet.
Create one skeleton king with a two-handed sword.
Create one zombie that spreads disease.
Ranged necrotic touch attack.
notes: Living targets take 1.5x damage, round up.
You heal yourself by NL even if damage dealt is 0.
No effect on shadow or incorporeal creatures.

abilities.summary: Resurrect a recently fallen living being.
Manipulate undead aggro and gain melee bonuses.
Create darkness around yourself or an aura around allies.
notes: Creating or sustaining SS does not count as an attack.
At level 4 and above, you choose which allies are affected by the aura option.

abilities.summary: Travel between shadows.
Ambush after shadow walking.
Attack a target via its own shadow.
notes: Always hits but receives no marginal hit bonus.
Counts as an attack and breaks stealth-like effects.

abilities.summary: Cosmetic alterations only.
Create one semi-shadow fighter.
